examples: I looked at the table, cupping my hand around my beer.
"This one is Lisa, " he says, lovingly cupping a huge bovine head in his arms as she licks him.
Lumpy men shiver by the tunnels, cupping their hands, sneaking a smoke.
My husband and I traded off carrying her, 35 pounds of self-fertilized toddler, the crowds around us cupping their noses, forming a spontaneous avoidance zone.
